abstract: Kinetic typography and text animation patterns covering character reveals, typewriter effects, variable font animation, text morphing, and GSAP SplitText integration.

accessibility.screen_readers: All text splitting patterns include aria-label preservation and aria-hidden spans
accessibility.keyboard_navigation: Text animation does not interfere with keyboard navigation
accessibility.color_contrast: Text remains readable during and after animation

performance.reflow_management: Text splitting occurs on mount, not on every frame
performance.mobile_optimization: Reduced complexity on mobile; slower stagger acceptable

browser_support.transforms: All modern browsers with GPU acceleration
browser_support.variable_fonts: All modern browsers (IE 11 fallback to static fonts)
